tokens.range: a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
a son (as a builder of the family name), in the widest sense (of literal and figurative relationship, including grandson, subject, nation, quality or condition, etc., (like father or brother), etc.)
a compact (because made by passing between pieces of flesh)
a daughter (used in the same wide sense as other terms of relationship, literally and figuratively)

tokens.text: unto thee and to thy seed
tokens.range: seed; figuratively, fruit, plant, sowing-time, posterity
an enactment; hence, an appointment (of time, space, quantity, labor or usage)
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
Jisrael, a symbolical name of Jacob; also (typically) of his posterity
properly, powder, i.e. (specifically) salt (as easily pulverized and dissolved)
to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
properly, concealed, i.e. the vanishing point; generally, time out of mind (past or future), i.e. (practically) eternity; frequentatively, adverbial (especially with prepositional prefix) always
the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
a present (as offered up), especially in sacrifice or as tribute

flags.note: בְּרִית — "covenant." The full weight: a formal, oath-bound relationship with stipulations and consequences. English "covenant" is thinner than the Hebrew concept.
יהוה — The divine name (YHWH). LORD (small caps) hides the personal name. Yahweh/Jehovah are reconstructions of the consonants. The MKT's choice shapes the reader's sense of intimacy with God.
עוֹלָם — "eternal" / "everlasting" / "age-long." Like Greek αἰώνιος, debate centers on whether this is absolute timelessness or the span of an era.
Dispute level 2: multiple significant translation options.

19.struct: contains a main verb; prepositional phrase(s); ⚑ theologically contested vocabulary

tokens.range: flesh (from its freshness); by extension, body, person; also (by euphemistically) the pudenda of aman
the breast (as most seen in front)
the right hand or side (leg, eye) of a person or other object (as the stronger and more dexterous); locally, the south
the (lower) leg (as a runner)

tokens.text: of them shall be thine as the wave
tokens.range: a brandishing (in threat); by implication, tumult; specifically, the official undulation of sacrificial offerings
a threshing-floor (as made even); by analogy, any open area

tokens.text: unto you as though it were the corn
tokens.range: properly, increase, i.e. grain
properly, to plait or interpenetrate, i.e. (literally) to weave or (generally) to fabricate; figuratively, to plot or contrive (usually in a malicious sense); hence (from the mental effort) to think,
a trough (as dug out); specifically, a wine-vat (whether the lower one, into which the juice drains; or the upper, in which the grapes are crushed)
something fulfilled, i.e. abundance (of produce)
a present (as offered up), especially in sacrifice or as tribute
properly, increase, i.e. grain
fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part
fat, whether literally or figuratively; hence, the richest or choice part
Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
oil (as producing light); figuratively, anointing

tokens.text: of them which they shall offer
tokens.range: to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
to give, used with greatest latitude of application (put, make, etc.)
the first, in place, time, order or rank (specifically, a firstfruit)
must or fresh grape-juice (as just squeezed out); by implication (rarely) fermented wine

flags.note: יהוה — The divine name (YHWH). LORD (small caps) hides the personal name. Yahweh/Jehovah are reconstructions of the consonants. The MKT's choice shapes the reader's sense of intimacy with God.

a consecrated thing or place, especially, a palace, sanctuary (whether of Jehovah or of idols) or asylum
a present; specifically (in a good sense), a sacrificial offering, (in a bad sense) a bribe
to be high actively, to rise or raise (in various applications, literally or figuratively)
a present (as offered up), especially in sacrifice or as tribute

flags.note: יהוה — The divine name (YHWH). LORD (small caps) hides the personal name. Yahweh/Jehovah are reconstructions of the consonants. The MKT's choice shapes the reader's sense of intimacy with God.

29.struct: contains a main verb; ⚑ theologically contested vocabulary

tokens.range: physical (as shutting in) a net (either literally or figuratively); usually a doomed object; abstractly extermination
